name: aurora-alert-dialog
title: Aurora Alert Dialog
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Confirmation dialog built on the Aurora modal surface for destructive or high-friction decisions.

files.content:
"use client"
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogBody,
  DialogClose,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogTrigger,
} from "@/registry/aurora/ui/dialog"

const AlertDialog = Dialog
const AlertDialogTrigger = DialogTrigger
const AlertDialogContent = DialogContent
const AlertDialogHeader = DialogHeader
const AlertDialogTitle = DialogTitle
const AlertDialogDescription = DialogDescription
const AlertDialogBody = DialogBody
const AlertDialogFooter = DialogFooter
const AlertDialogCancel = DialogClose
const AlertDialogAction = DialogClose

export {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogAction,
  AlertDialogBody,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
  AlertDialogTrigger,
}

docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/alert-dialog.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-dialog`.
